words.def: something that should remain hidden from others (especially information that is not to be passed on)
words.zh: n. 秘密, 機密, 秘訣, 秘方

words.def: a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms
words.zh: n. 樹木；喬木；樹狀結構（tree的複數）

words.def: a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms
words.zh: n. 樹, 木料, 樹狀物

words.def: something left after other parts have been taken away
words.zh: n. 休息, 睡眠, 安息, 稍息, 靜止, 支架, 休息處, 其餘者, 剩餘部分

words.def: the seat within a bishop's diocese where his cathedral is located
words.zh: vt. 看見, 檢視, 參觀, 遊覽, 理解, 知道, 同意

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
